landing.heroTitle: Not sure which stocks to buy? We already picked the best ones.
landing.heroSubtitle: Every night we look at what professional analysts recommend across 200+ stocks worldwide. The ones they agree on most — with the biggest upside — end up here. You just pick the ones that fit your budget and region.
landing.problemTitle: What this app does for you
landing.problem1Text: Professional analysts study stocks full-time and publish price targets. We collect all their recommendations and show you which stocks they're most confident about.
landing.problem2Text: You won't see 10,000 tickers here. We show you a curated list of the top picks — the ones where analysts see real upside and mostly agree it's a buy.
landing.problem3Title: Tell us your budget, get a portfolio
landing.problem3Text: Type in how much you want to invest. Auto-Mix splits it across top stocks for you — diversified, balanced, ready to buy. No math needed.
landing.step1Text: Dozens of professional analysts publish price targets and buy/sell ratings for every major stock. We collect all of them.
landing.step2Text: Stocks where many analysts agree and see big upside get the highest score. You see the best opportunities first.
landing.step3Text: US stocks only? Tech sector? Under $100? Available at your broker? Set your filters and see what matches.
landing.step4Text: Enter your budget. Auto-Mix creates a balanced portfolio with the top picks. Then buy through your preferred broker.
landing.featuresTitle: Here's what today's top picks look like
landing.etfSubtitle: ETFs ranked by how much they actually returned over the last 1, 3, and 5 years. Updated weekly.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to see the full list?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create a free account and start browsing today's top analyst picks.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing

pricing.dayPassSubtitle: Get full Plus-level access without a subscription. Each pass gives you separate 24-hour activations to use whenever you want.
pricing.dayPassAccess: Full Plus access per activation (24 hours each)
pricing.dayPassNote: Passes unlock the full upside list, unlimited auto-mix, detail pages, and all filters. Watchlists and alerts require Plus.

footer.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

about.title: About Bonistock
about.missionText: To democratize analyst-grade investment research for everyday investors. We believe everyone deserves access to the same data Wall Street uses — presented simply, scored transparently, and actionable in seconds.
about.howWeWorkText: We aggregate analyst ratings and price targets from commercial data providers, compute a composite upside × conviction score, and present the results in a beginner-friendly interface. Our Auto-Mix engine converts any dollar amount into a diversified, risk-weighted portfolio you can execute with one click.
about.transparencyText: Every score, every rating, every recommendation is shown with its source data. We flag thin analyst coverage, warn about downtrend risks, and always anchor portfolios with diversified ETFs. We'd rather lose a click than your trust.

filters.title: Filters
filters.noResults: No stocks match your filters. Try broadening your criteria.
filters.brokerNote: Not all stocks/ETFs are available on every broker. European-listed ETFs (UCITS) are typically not available on US-only brokers like Robinhood.
